title: Oru Punnagai Poove Song Lyrics 12 B
stanzas:
Love Pannu - Oru Punnagai Poove Song Lyrics 12 B
#HarrishJayaraj

Engaeiyo pogindra
megam nirkkuthu
En paerai unn paerai
solli alaikkuthu
Love pannu,Love pannu

Oh Oha......
Oru punnagai poovae,
Siru pookkalin theevae
Nee yennai mattum
kaadhal pannu.

Yen vaaliba nenjam,
Unn kaaladi kenjum,
Siru kaadhal pichai
podu kannu.

Naan kenji kaetkum neram,
Unn nenjin oram eeram,
Ahh, chacho acho,
kaadhal vaaratho?

Engaeiyo pogindra
megam nirkkuthu
En paerai unn paerai
solli alaikkuthu
Love pannu,Love pannu

Suriyan vaasal vanthu
ice cream koodukkum,
Oodaathaamaa, veelaathammaa.
Chandran ullae vanthu
chocolate koodukkum,
Suthaathamma, reeluthaammaa.

Unn padukkai araiyilae,
Oru vasandham vaendumaa?
Unn kuliyal araiyilae,
Winter season vaendumaa?
Nee maara sonnadhum,
Naangu seasonum maara vaendumaa?
Love pannu,

Engaeiyo pogindra
megam nirkkuthu
En paerai unn paerai
solli alaikkuthu
Love pannu,Love pannu

Embathu aandungal
ilamaiyum vaendumaa?
Meiyaagumaa? Meiyaagumaa?
Sodakkondru pottathum
sorgam vaendumaa?
Meiyaagumaa? Meiyaagumaa?

Ada vellai vellaiyaai
Or iravu vaendumaa?
Pudhu velicham podavae
Iru nilavu vaendumaa?

Unnai kaalai maalaiyum,
Suttri varuvathu,
Kaadhal seiyavae,
Love pannu, aiyo pannu!

Engaeiyo pogindra
megam nirkkuthu
En paerai unn paerai
solli alaikkuthu
Love pannu,Love pannu

ru punnagai poovae,
Siru pookkalin theevae
Nee yennai mattum
kaadhal pannu.

Yen vaaliba nenjam,
Unn kaaladi kenjum,
Siru kaadhal pichai
podu kannu.

Nee kenji kaetkum naeram,
Yen nenjin oram eeram,
Aah chacho acho
kaadhal vanthaacho?

seo.title: Oru Punnagai Poove Song Lyrics 12 B

seo.keywords: 12B, Harrish Jeyaraj, KK, Prashanthini, Oru Punnagai Poove full lyrics, 12B songs lyrics, Oru Punnagai Poove lyrics snippets, Oru Punnagai Poove WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Oru Punnagai Poove lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses the feelings of love and affection, portraying a romantic connection between two individuals.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In 12B, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the blossoming romance between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by KK and Prashanthini, both of whom bring a unique charm to the melody.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Oru Punnagai Poove was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, known for his catchy and melodious tunes.

When was the song released?

The song was released on September 28, 2001, as part of the movie 12B.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Punnagai Poove, the song encapsulates the innocence and joy of young love, making it a memorable piece in the film 12B. The lyrics convey a heartfelt message of affection, while the melodious composition evokes a sense of nostalgia. As the characters navigate their emotions, the song serves as a backdrop to their romantic journey. With its enchanting melody and relatable theme, it resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Punnagai Poove from 12B is a heartwarming duet that beautifully captures the essence of young love. With KK's soulful voice complemented by Prashanthini's sweet melodies, this song transports listeners to a world of romance and nostalgia. The enchanting composition by Harrish Jeyaraj adds a magical touch, making it a timeless favorite.
stanzaMeanings: A smiling flower... the essence of small blossoms....
A cloud is moving somewhere, calling out my name and your name. Love me, love me.
Oh, oh... a smiling flower, the essence of small blossoms. You love only me.
My heart of life, your feet touch it, give me a little love.
When I ask, your heart responds, ah, oh, does love come?
A cloud is moving somewhere, calling out my name and your name. Love me, love me.
The sun comes to give ice cream, is it not fun, is it not fun? The moon comes to give chocolate, is it not sweet, is it not sweet?
In your embrace, do we need a spring? In your warmth, do we need a winter? If you change, do all seasons need to change? Love me,
A cloud is moving somewhere, calling out my name and your name. Love me, love me.
Do we need youth in our lives? Is it real? Is it real? Do we need heaven after the troubles? Is it real? Is it real?
Do we need a bright night? Do we need a new light?
You will come around in the morning and evening, just to love, love me, oh love me!
A cloud is moving somewhere, calling out my name and your name. Love me, love me.
A smiling flower, the essence of small blossoms. You love only me.
My heart of life, your feet touch it, give me a little love.
When you ask, my heart responds, ah, oh, has love come?
